author: Marie Dupont
title: IT Director
text: JPrunier transformed our boardroom experience. Their expertise in Crestron integration is unmatched, and the support has been exceptional.

author: David Chen
title: Facilities Manager
text: The AI-powered automation they implemented has saved us countless hours. Their team is professional, responsive, and truly understands our needs.

author: Sophie Martin
title: Campus Director
text: JPrunier's consulting services helped us design a scalable AV infrastructure for our campus. Their foresight has proven invaluable.
